title: BungeeUtilisalsX
description: AIO plugin for easy proxy management. Management commands, announcers, punishments, parties, friends, ...
body:
# BungeeUtilisalsX

**If you have any questions regarding this plugin, suggestions, features or bugs, please message me or join my [Discord server](https://discord.endoy.dev/).**

BungeeUtilisalsX is an all-in-one solution for your BungeeCord or Velocity server coming with many features such as management commands, punishments, announcers (bossbar, tab, chat, title and actionbar), friends system, party system, motd, server balancers and many many more.

Everything in the plugin is fully configurable and very lenient and allows for countless possibilities.
